recommendations.title: The Thirteenth Year
recommendations.overview: A teen learns that his birth mother is a mermaid after he begins to grow fins and slimy scales on his thirteenth birthday.

recommendations.title: Return to Halloweentown
recommendations.genres: Family, Fantasy, Comedy, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: As Halloweentown prepares to celebrate its 1,000th anniversary, Marnie Piper and her brother Dylan return to Witch University, where trouble is in session from the Sinister Sisters and from someone who's plotting to use Marnie's powers for evil.

recommendations.title: Being John Malkovich
recommendations.overview: One day at work, unsuccessful puppeteer Craig finds a portal into the head of actor John Malkovich. The portal soon becomes a passion for anybody who enters its mad and controlling world of overtaking another human body.

recommendations.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
recommendations.overview: A girl, sent by her parents to live with her two eccentric aunts, finds out on her sixteenth birthday that she is a witch.

recommendations.title: Girl in the Basement
recommendations.overview: Sara is a teen girl who is looking forward to her 18th birthday to move away from her controlling father Don. But before she could even blow out the candles, Don imprisons her in the basement of their home.

recommendations.title: The Christmas Secret
recommendations.overview: While her life is falling apart, single mother Christine finds a magical family heirloom that leads to love and good fortune during Christmas.
